author: BVM Sportsdesk
title: Vi Jones Activated for Giants Match as Bucs Strengthen Linebacking Corps
text:
Vi Jones Activated for Giants Match as Bucs Strengthen Linebacking Corps
The
Tampa Bay Buccaneers elevated linebacker Vi Jones from the practice squad just in time for their Week 12 matchup against the New York Giants. This marks Jones' third and final elevation this season, following the waiver of rookie linebacker Antonio Grier. With Jones active, the Buccaneers now have four off-ball linebackers available for the game at MetLife Stadium.
- Jones has appeared in two games this season, playing 23 special teams snaps and three defensive snaps.
- Teams can elevate practice squad players up to three times per regular season.
- The Buccaneers have activated 54 players for the game but will name six inactives before kickoff.
- Jones joins starters Lavonte David and K.J. Britt, along with reserve J.J. Russell in the linebacker group.
Following this game, Jones will revert back to the practice squad unless further activated for future games, as this is his final eligibility for elevation this season.Bottom Line
The Buccaneers are strategically utilizing the practice squad elevation rule to enhance their roster as they face the Giants, emphasizing their depth at linebacker during the ongoing season.

 www.buccaneers.com
